I can do that — quick note about availability first:

Your calendar on 2024-05-19 already has:
- Project Kick-off — 10:00–11:00 (Office 44A)

So 10:00 is not available. Suggested one-hour alternatives that day:
- 09:00–10:00
- 11:30–12:30
(If you prefer a later time, tell me a range and I’ll look for openings.)

Before I schedule, a few quick clarifying questions:
1. Which time do you want (09:00–10:00 or 11:30–12:30), or another time?
2. Title for the event (suggestion: "Follow-up Meeting")?
3. Short description text (suggested: "Follow-up to discuss action items from the Project Kick-off.") — I can use or edit this.
4. Participants to invite (none by default — do you want the same participants as the Project Kick-off, or specific people)?
5. Location (suggestion: keep blank or use "Office 44A" or a virtual link)?

Tell me those (or say “use my suggestions and schedule at [chosen time]”), and I’ll create the one-hour event.
